title: Effective Berries
description: Effective Berries adds new berries to the game which give you boosted status effects.
body:
# Effective Berries

## 📖About

Ever wanted stronger potion effects? Well you've come to the right place!

This mod adds 5 new berries to the game which give you boosted status effects.


## ❓Supported Versions

- 1.21.1

## ℹ️Other Information

Currently only supported on NeoForge but a port for Fabric is planned for the future.

Here is the [source code](https://github.com/ltzWolf/Effective-Berries).
